title: Create Dream Big
description: a pack with create aeronautics and many create addons
body:
![Create Dream Big](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d489a76f62e2180a3fa473f6e782d719968dfb22.png)

**This is a mod pack focused around create and create aeronautics**

### theres lots of create add on's like
1. create
2. create nuclear
3. create aeronautics
4. create jetpack
5. create steelskin
6. create gunsmithing
7. create ironworks
8. create numismatics
9. create big connons
10. create central kitchen
11. create blocks & bogies
12. create broken bad rebroken
13. create sound of steam
14. create the factory must grow
15. creating space

**those are just the main ones**

## **the pack is made for my official server but you can also host a server with**
![ENDERHOST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3903812a99ff3759c4d64ef47a104a1c29678806.png)
Use code **farmerchey** for 20% off your first month
[ENDERHOST](https://enderhost.co/)
